Frequently asked questions

Is this really a member reward? ⌄
Yes! This is a limited-time member reward. Simply complete the short verification process to claim your gift card.
How long does it take? ⌄
Complete the 5 steps above, including answering questions, filling in your details, and completing 3–5 sponsor deals to unlock your reward.
When will I receive my gift card? ⌄
Gift cards are delivered instantly to your email after completing the claim process.
Can I use it for anything at Costco? ⌄
Absolutely. Your $750 gift card can be used on any product at Costco, both in-store and online.
